changes.old:
- per-feature files use `NNN-feature-name.md` with a **globally sequential 3-digit prefix** per skill (does not reset per category — matches manual testing playbook convention)
- one root entry maps to one per-feature file
changes.new:
- per-feature files use `feature-name.md` (no numeric prefix)
- one root entry maps to one per-feature file

changes.old:
**Naming rule**:
- category numbering defines root section order
- per-feature numbering defines local order within the category
changes.new:
**Naming rule**:
- category numbering defines root section order
- per-feature snippet order is defined by the root catalog listing order; filenames no longer encode order. Category folders keep `NN--` numbering for section order.

changes.old:
- per-feature files use stable numeric slugs such as `001-feature-name.md`
- every feature ID maps to exactly one per-feature file
changes.new:
- per-feature files use stable slugs such as `feature-name.md` (no numeric prefix)
- every feature ID maps to exactly one per-feature file

changes.old:
│   ├── 001-feature-name.md
│   └── 002-feature-name.md
└── 02--another-category/              # Required per-feature files for category 2

```
changes.new:
│   ├── feature-name.md
│   └── feature-name.md
└── 02--another-category/              # Required per-feature files for category 2
    └── feature-name.md

changes.old:
| Retrieval | `01--retrieval` | `001-unified-context-retrieval-memorycontext.md` |
| Mutation | `02--mutation` | `016-memory-indexing-memorysave.md` (continues from retrieval) |
| Tooling and scripts | `17--tooling-and-scripts` | `145-admin-cli-bootstrap.md` (continues from prior cats) |

- Per-feature files use `NNN-feature-name.md` with a **globally sequential 3-digit prefix** that continues across all categories (does not reset per category). This matches the manual testing playbook convention.
- Assign numbers by sorting categories in directory order, then files within each category.
changes.new:
- Per-feature files use `feature-name.md` (no numeric prefix).
- Per-feature snippet order is defined by the root catalog listing order; filenames no longer encode order. Category folders keep `NN--` numbering for section order.

changes.old: - [ ] Per-feature file numbers are globally sequential across categories (not per-category), 3-digit zero-padded
changes.new: - [ ] Per-feature snippet order matches root catalog listing order (filenames do not encode order)

changes.old: Copy everything inside the code fence into `feature_catalog/{CATEGORY_DIR}/{NN}-{feature-name}.md`:
changes.new: Copy everything inside the code fence into `feature_catalog/{CATEGORY_DIR}/{feature-name}.md`:

changes.old: - Preserve the feature file path and category numbering after publication — other docs link to this path.
changes.new: - Preserve the feature file path after publication — other docs link to this path. Category FOLDER numbering is preserved; per-feature files have no numeric prefix.

│   ├── feature-name.md
│   └── feature-name.md
└── 02--another-category/               # Required per-feature files for category 2
    └── feature-name.md
```

- every feature ID maps to exactly one per-feature file
changes.new:
- per-feature files use stable slugs such as `feature-name.md` (no numeric prefix)
- every feature ID maps to exactly one per-feature file

changes.old: - Per-feature files: stable numeric file IDs such as `001-feature-name.md`
changes.new: - Per-feature files: stable slugs such as `feature-name.md`

notes: validate_document.py and template_rules.json need no change: neither file contains a stale comment/description mentioning NNN-feature.md.
